column2: THIS build fails instead of the launcher silently

column1: # refusing to install it. Used by [env:cardputer-adv-launcher].
# Subtype is 'factory' (not the launcher's 'test') so a launcher build flashed
# straight over USB still boots normally; the firmware.bin is identical either
# way (the app image is partition-offset independent)
# installs it into its own dynamically-created partition regardless.
